Part.Source: Event Start LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Sim, 1, &AutNiv) &AuxEmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &EmpCod = &Context.EmpCod &PesCod = &Context.PesCod &FilCod = &Context.FilCod /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = Page.Rows Grid_Empowerer.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' &CreFrpPgtoTip1 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' &CreFrpPgtoTip2 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip2) &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &CreFrpPgtoTip3 = nullvalue(&CreFrpPgtoTip3) &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' AddDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 2, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters1.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) AddDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterShow_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters2.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) RemoveDynamicFilters3.JSEvent('onclick', format(!"WWPDynFilterHideLast_AL('%1', 3, 0)", TableDynamicFilters.InternalName)) &CreSts = nullvalue(&CreSts) DDO_Grid.GridInternalName = Grid.InternalName Form.Caption = ' Duplicatas' Do 'PrepareTransaction' Do 'LoadGridState' If &OrderedBy < 1 &OrderedBy = 1 Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' EndIf &DDO_TitleSettingsIcons = GetWWPTitleSettingsIcons() GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue = Grid.Rows /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ LoadWWPContext.Call(&Context) Do 'SaveGridState' &GridCurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage &GridPageCount = Grid.PageCount /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangePage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Previous' Grid.PreviousPage() Case GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage = !'Next' Grid.NextPage() Otherwise &PageToGo.FromString(GridPaginationBar.SelectedPage) Grid.GotoPage(&PageToGo) EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event GridPaginationBar.ChangeRowsPerPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Grid.Rows = GridPaginationBar.RowsPerPageSelectedValue Grid.FirstPage() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event DDO_Grid.OnOptionClicked /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderASC#>' OR DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>' &OrderedBy.FromString(DDO_Grid.SelectedValue_get) &OrderedDsc = iif(DDO_Grid.ActiveEventKey = !'<#OrderDSC#>', true, false) Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' Grid.FirstPage() EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event Grid.Load /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &Update = !'' &Update.Link = addDuplicatas.Link('wwDuplicatasRenegociacao', 'UPD', EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) &Display = !'' &Display.Link = wpDuplicataRenegociada.Link(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) &ActionG.Clear() &ActionG.AddItem(0, 'WWP_ActionGroupCaption') &ActionG.AddItem(1, 'Pagamentos') &ActionG.AddItem(2, 'Adicionar Obs') If (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.GerarBoleto or (CreCbrImp = TipoImpressao.ImprimirBoleto and CreBloNro <> '') ) &ActionG.AddItem(3, 'Envia E-mail') Endif If (CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.Cancelada) &ActionG.AddItem(4, 'Cancelar') Endif If (CreCrbRegAut = Status_SimNao.Sim and CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber and (CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() or CreDtaRet.IsNull())) &ActionG.AddItem(5, 'Registrar Online') Endif If (CreCrbRegAut = Status_SimNao.Sim and CreRecPag = ReceberPagar.Receber and CreCbrCtaBanBanCod <> '237') &ActionG.AddItem(6, 'CMD Instrução Online') Endif &ActionG.AddItem(7, 'Log.Alteração') &Recibo = !'' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = True AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = True Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector1.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'AddDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = True AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = False RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = True /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector2.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event 'RemoveDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersRemoving = True &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' Do 'ResetDynFilters' Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' &DynamicFiltersRemoving = False Grid.Refresh() /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &DynamicFiltersSelector3.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Event &ActionG.Click /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ Do Case Case &ActionG = 1 Do 'Do AddPgto' Case &ActionG = 2 Do 'Do AddObs' Case &ActionG = 3 Do 'Do Email' Case &ActionG = 4 Do 'Do Cancelar' Case &ActionG = 5 Do 'Do RegistroOnline' Case &ActionG = 6 Do 'Do ComandoIntrucao' Case &ActionG = 7 Do 'Do LogAlteracao' EndCase &ActionG = 0 /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndEvent Sub 'SetDDOSortedStatus' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ DDO_Grid.SortedStatus = &OrderedBy.ToString().Trim() + !':' + iif(&OrderedDsc, !'DSC', !'ASC') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters1' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreCbrCod1.Visible = False &CrePedCod1.Visible = False &CreCod1.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip1.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDCOD' &CrePedCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod1.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip1.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters2' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreCbrCod2.Visible = False &CrePedCod2.Visible = False &CreCod2.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip2.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREPEDCOD' &CrePedCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod2.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip2.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &CreCbrCod3.Visible = False &CrePedCod3.Visible = False &CreCod3.Visible = False &CreFrpPgtoTip3.Visible = False Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREPEDCOD' &CrePedCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod3.Visible = True Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip3.Visible = True EndCase /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'ResetDynFilters' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod2.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters2' &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 = False &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod3.SetEmpty() Do 'EnableDynamicFilters3' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddPgto' If CreSts = Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA msg('ATENÇÃO! Duplicata cancelada verifique!') Else wwduplicataPagamentos.link(EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod) EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do AddObs' wwduplicataObs.Popup('WWDUPLICATASRENEGOCIACAO', EmpCod,FilCod,CreCod, 0) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Email' If CreSts <> Status_Duplicata.CANCELADA &sdtBoleto.Clear() &sdtBoletoItem = new() &sdtBoletoItem.CreEmpCod = EmpCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreFilCod = FilCod &sdtBoletoItem.CreCod = CreCod &sdtBoleto.Add(&sdtBoletoItem) GerarBoleto.call(&sdtBoleto, true, &IsErro, &newSdtBoleto) if &IsErro = false &WebSession.Set('wpEnviaBoleto', &sdtBoleto.Toxml()) wpEnviaBoleto.Popup() EndIF EndIF /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do Cancelar' Do CAse CAse CrePedCod <> 0 &AutNiv = RetornaAutorizacao.UDP('VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO', Status_SimNao.Nao, 1) If &AutNiv > 0 FechaFinanceiroPedidoVenda.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', EmpCod, FilCod, CrePedCod, false) Else msg('Não Autorizado ao Nível de Fechar Financeiro Pedido Venda. [VENDAFECHAFINANCEIRO]') EndIF CAse CreFrtCod <> 0 //cancela frete wpCancelaFrete.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreFrtCod) Refresh Case CreRenDstCod > 0 wpCancelarRenegociacaoReceber.Popup(EmpCod, CreRenDstCod) Refresh Otherwise //do CAncelar Duplicata manual retornaAutorizacao.Call('WWDUPLICATAS', Status_SimNao.Nao, 3, &AutNiv) If &AutNiv >= 3 wpConfirmaCancelarDuplicata.Popup(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ Else msg('Usuário não autorizado a cancelar duplicata necessário nível 3 - WWDUPLICATAS') EndIf EndCAse EndSub Sub 'Do RegistroOnline' &IstentarPendentes = false Do case Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '077' //INTER &IstentarPendentes = true prcGeraBoletoInter.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod,&PesCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '133' if CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() or CreDtaRet.IsNull() prcGeraBoletoCresol.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) EndIf case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '237' //Bradesco GeraBoletoBradesco.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '748' //Sicredi GeraBoletoApiECommerce.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) case CreCbrCtaBanBanCod = '999' //JASPI PAGAMENTOS ZOOP if CreDtaRet.IsEmpty() or CreDtaRet.IsNull() ValidaCliente.call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCliCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) if &IsErro = false GeraBoletoApi_ZoopCliente.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCliCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Endif if &IsErro = false GeraBoletoApi_ZoopDuplicata.Call(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, &IsErro, &Mensagem) Refresh Else msg(&Mensagem) Endif Else Refresh msg('Boleto já registrado. Já possui data de retorno!') Endif EndCase if &IstentarPendentes = true prcAtualizaRetornoInter.Call(EmpCod, &PesCod) Endif if not &Mensagem.IsEmpty() msg(&Mensagem) Endif /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do ComandoIntrucao' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ wpComandarInstrucaoZoop.PopUp(EmpCod, FilCod, CreCod, CreCbrCtaBanBanCod, CreCbrTipBol) Refresh /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'Do LogAlteracao' &AuditRecordKeyValue = trim(str(EmpCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(FilCod)) + ', ' + trim(str(CreCod)) wwLogAlteracoes.Popup(&AuditRecordKeyValue, 'DUPLICATAS') /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ // Load grid state from session. If &Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState") = !"" &GridState.FromXml(LoadGridState.Udp(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Else &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) Endif &OrderedBy = &GridState.OrderedBy &OrderedDsc = &GridState.OrderedDsc Do 'SetDDOSortedStatus' For &GridStateFilterValue in &GridState.FilterValues Do Case Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRESTS" &CreSts.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRERENDSTCOD" &CreRenDstCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLICOD" &CreCliCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"CRECLIRAZ" &CreCliRaz.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) Case &GridStateFilterValue.Name = !"FILCOD" &FilCod.FromString(&GridStateFilterValue.Value) EndCase EndFor Do 'LoadDynFiltersState' If not &GridState.PageSize.Trim().IsEmpty() Grid.Rows = &GridState.PageSize.ToNumeric() EndIf Grid.CurrentPage = &GridState.CurrentPage /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'LoadDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ AddDynamicFilters1.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters1.Visible = False AddDynamicFilters2.Visible = True RemoveDynamicFilters2.Visible = False If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 1 &GridStateDynamicFilter = &GridState.DynamicFilters.Item(1) &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' &CreCbrCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDCOD' &CrePedCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECOD' &CreCod1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' &CreFrpPgtoTip1.FromString(&GridStateDynamicFilter.Value) EndCase Do 'EnableDynamicFilters1' If &GridState.DynamicFilters.Count >= 2 JSDynamicFilters.Caption = !'' EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersRemoving JSDynamicFilters.Caption = '' EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveGridState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.FromXml(&Session.Get(&PgmName + !"GridState")) // Save grid state in session. &GridState.OrderedBy = &OrderedBy &GridState.OrderedDsc = &OrderedDsc &GridState.FilterValues.Clear() WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRESTS", "", not &CreSts.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreSts, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRERENDSTCOD", "", not &CreRenDstCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreRenDstCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLICOD", "", not &CreCliCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliCod.ToString().Trim(), '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"CRECLIRAZ", "", not &CreCliRaz.IsEmpty(), 0, &CreCliRaz, '') WWP_GridStateAddFilterValue(&GridState, !"FILCOD", "", not &FilCod.IsEmpty(), 0, &FilCod.ToString().Trim(), '') Do 'SaveDynFiltersState' &GridState.PageSize = str(Grid.Rows) &GridState.CurrentPage = Grid.CurrentPage SaveGridState.Call(&PgmName + !"GridState", &GridState.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'SaveDynFiltersState' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &GridState.DynamicFilters.Clear() If not &DynamicFiltersIgnoreFirst &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector1 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREPEDCOD' AND not &CrePedCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CrePedCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CRECOD' AND not &CreCod1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCod1.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector1 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip1.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip1.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled2 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector2 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREPEDCOD' AND not &CrePedCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CrePedCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CRECOD' AND not &CreCod2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCod2.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector2 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip2.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip2.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf If &DynamicFiltersEnabled3 &GridStateDynamicFilter = new() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Selected = &DynamicFiltersSelector3 Do Case Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECBRCOD' AND not &CreCbrCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCbrCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREPEDCOD' AND not &CrePedCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CrePedCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CRECOD' AND not &CreCod3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreCod3.ToString() Case &DynamicFiltersSelector3 = !'CREFRPPGTOTIP' AND not &CreFrpPgtoTip3.IsEmpty() &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value = &CreFrpPgtoTip3.ToString() EndCase If &DynamicFiltersRemoving OR not &GridStateDynamicFilter.Value.IsEmpty() &GridState.DynamicFilters.Add(&GridStateDynamicFilter) EndIf EndIf /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Sub 'PrepareTransaction' /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */ &TrnContext = new() &TrnContext.CallerObject = &Pgmname &TrnContext.CallerOnDelete = True &TrnContext.CallerURL = &HTTPRequest.ScriptName + !"?" + &HTTPRequest.QueryString &TrnContext.TransactionName = !"Duplicatas" &Session.Set(!"TrnContext", &TrnContext.ToXml()) /* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */ EndSub Event &Recibo.Click &Random = serverTime() wpImprimirPedidoRenegociado.Popup(EmpCod,FilCod,&Random,CreRenDstCod,0,CreCliCod) Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCbrCod1.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCbrCod2.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCbrCod3.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CrePedCod1.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CrePedCod2.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CrePedCod3.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCod1.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCod2.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCod3.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCliCod.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreRenDstCod.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreCliRaz.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreSts.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &FilCod.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreFrpPgtoTip1.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreFrpPgtoTip2.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent Event &CreFrpPgtoTip3.ControlValueChanged Refresh EndEvent

/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [Start] - Do not change */
/* Generated by DVelop Work With Plus Pattern [End] - Do not change */
